THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $6,497.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Oct-30-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Petitioner PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is Granted. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Anthony Schoenberg; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents
Off Calendar Jul-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: ATTY. PAMELA UNDERWOOD, TEL. NO. 551-9544 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Petitioner PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion to Compel Answers to Petitioner's First Set of Demand for Production and Inspection of Documents is Granted, no opposition filed. Plaintiff is to provide verified, objection-free responses within 10 days of receiving notice of the order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro-tem : Charles Geerhart; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported.
=(302/JPT)
